meta.title: ForceField Python SDK -- AI Security in 3 Lines of Code | Data Science Technologies
meta.description: Open-source Python SDK for prompt injection detection, PII redaction, and LLM security. Install with pip, protect your AI app in minutes.
meta.keywords: Python SDK, AI security, prompt injection detection, PII redaction, LLM firewall, pip install, ONNX, guardrails, open source, forcefield

hero.title: ForceField Python SDK
hero.subtitle: pip install forcefield
hero.tagline: AI security in 3 lines of Python. No API keys, no cloud dependency, no vendor lock-in.

quickstart.title: 3 Lines to Secure Your App
quickstart.code:
from forcefield import Guard

guard = Guard()
result = guard.scan("Ignore all previous instructions")
# result.blocked == True, result.risk_score == 0.95

items.title: Prompt Injection Detection
items.description: 12 attack categories: instruction override, jailbreaks, role switching, token smuggling, payload splitting, data extraction, indirect injection, and more.

items.title: ML-Powered Scoring
items.description: Bundled TF-IDF + Logistic Regression model exported to ONNX (235 KB). Classifies prompts into benign, prompt_injection, jailbreak, or data_exfiltration.

items.title: PII Detection & Redaction
items.description: Detect and redact emails, phone numbers, SSNs, credit cards, IP addresses, and more. Four strategies: mask, hash, remove, partial.

items.title: Anti-Obfuscation
items.description: Defeats evasion techniques: zero-width characters, Cyrillic/Greek homoglyphs, leetspeak, mixed scripts, base64/URL/HTML encoding.

items.title: LLM Output Moderation
items.description: Scan AI responses for hate speech, violence, self-harm content, dangerous information, credential leaks, and jailbreak success indicators.

items.title: Session Tracking
items.description: Multi-turn attack detection. Tracks conversation risk across turns and detects escalation sequences like probe-then-inject patterns.

items.title: Template Validation
items.description: Detect backdoored Jinja2 chat templates: hardcoded instructions, base64 payloads, embedded special tokens, suspicious macros.

items.title: Endpoint Scanner
items.description: CLI command to red-team your own LLM endpoints. Runs 50+ attack prompts across 7 categories and generates a security report.

items.name: OpenAI
items.code:
from forcefield.integrations.openai import SafeOpenAI
client = SafeOpenAI()
items.description: Wraps the OpenAI client. Scans prompts before sending, moderates responses after.

items.name: FastAPI
items.description: ASGI middleware that scans all incoming request bodies automatically.

items.name: LangChain
items.description: Callback handler that scans prompts and outputs at every chain step.

commands.description: Scan a single prompt from the terminal
Run 116 built-in attack prompts and verify detection
Red-team your LLM endpoint with 50+ attacks

items.name: forcefield[ml]
items.description: ONNX Runtime for ML-powered detection (95%+ accuracy)

items.name: forcefield[cloud]
items.description: Cloud hybrid scoring via ForceField Gateway API
